title: CFS Bolt Bearing Strength
description: E3.3.1 & E3.3.2 of AISI 2012 - Bearing Strength (Resistance) With and Without Consideration of Bolt Hole Deformation

C.description: C. Bearing factor, determined in accordance with Table E3.3.1-1

m_f.description: mf. Modification factor for type of bearing connection, which is determined according to Table E3.3.1-2

d.description: Diameter. Units: in. Nominal bolt diameter

t.description: Gauge. Units: in. Uncoated sheet thickness

Fu.description: Ultimate Strength. Units: ksi. Tensile strength of sheet as defined in Section A2.1 or A2.2

Nc.description: Force Applied. Units: lb. Force applied to the bolt

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
